name: Mile High Shredded Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chuck roast or round steak
1 1/2 cups beef broth reserved from roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in hot oil on both sides, adding onion and celery at the last minute.
2. Combine beef, vegetables, and broth in a Dutch oven or crockpot.
3. Simmer, covered, for 3-4 hours or until tender.
4. Cool; shred beef, separating into strands.
5. Drain vegetables.
6. Combine with shredded beef.
7. Reserve broth; skim off any fat.
8. To make sauce: Mix reserved broth, beef, vegetables, garlic, salt, vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, chili powder, tabasco, bay leaf, paprika, garlic powder, and worcestershire sauce. Simmer until heated thoroughly. Remove bay leaf.
9. Serve on rolls or buns.
